questions: invoice e ki ki thaka dorkar?
answers: An invoice is a document sent by a seller to a buyer requesting payment for goods or services provided, detailing items, quantities, prices, and payment terms.
Invoice holo ekta payment request document ja tumi client ke pathao tomar service ba product er jonno. Eta professional way te taka charge kora.
An invoice should include your business name, client details, invoice number, date, itemized list of services/products, amounts, total due, payment terms, and bank details.
Popular invoicing tools include FreshBooks, QuickBooks, Wave, Zoho Invoice, and PayPal. Many are free for basic use and help track payments automatically.
